description: Mix style and festive fun together with this Christmas Pudding Headband! The design consists of a brown and white soft fabric covered head band, overlaid with three red pom pom 'berries' and adjustable holly leaves (with wire inserts). Sold: Single Material: Fabric Approx size: 15cm x 11cm / 5.9 in x 4.3 in One size fits all.
